label: Features Grid
description: Grid of feature cards with icons, titles, and descriptions

test_data.heading: Everything You Need
test_data.subheading: Powerful features to help you build and manage content with ease

features.title: Lightning Fast
features.description: Sub-50ms time to first byte with optimized rendering pipeline and intelligent caching.

features.title: Block-Based Editor
features.description: Build pages with drag-and-drop blocks. Each block has its own fields, templates, and styling.

features.title: Theme System
features.description: Fully customizable themes with CSS custom properties. Rebrand in minutes, not days.

features.title: Role-Based Access
features.description: Fine-grained permissions with customizable roles. Control who can access what.

features.title: Multi-Language
features.description: Built-in internationalization with language-specific content, menus, and layouts.

features.title: Extensible
features.description: Zero-rebuild extensions via Tengo scripts. Add custom logic without recompiling.
